name_en: Silver buckle 🌹 YSL Saint Laurent 'Néon' bag, latest version from Saint Laurent & SLP counters. Market exclusive 🍀🍀🍀 imported leather factory oil-waxed leather, hand-embroidered V-line, super soft and comfortable, exquisite shape 👏👏👏 practical, YSL gold buckle at opening, flawless hardware, exquisite handcraft details 🍂 Model 26612 🤡 size: 32*21*9cm
